name: The Tea Route
desc: Follow the historic tea trail through the lush highlands. Visit Domaine des Aubineaux, enjoy a tea tasting at Bois Chéri, discover rum and vanilla at Saint Aubin, then conclude at the dramatic black cliffs of Gris-Gris.
itin: Domaine de Bois Chéri — tea tasting
Domaine de Saint Aubin — rum & vanilla
notes: Private guided tour in air-conditioned vehicle. All entrances and lunch included. Minimum 2 pax.
